mapper.select: select * from aiw_investment_task_definition order by task_code asc
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_investment_task_definition (biz_id, task_code, task_type, cron, zone, enabled, parameters, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{bizId}, #{taskCode}, #{taskType}, #{cron}, #{zone}, #{enabled}, #{parameters}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on duplicate key update task_type = values(task_type), cron = values(cron), zone = values(zone), enabled = values(enabled), parameters = values(parameters), description = values(description), updated_at = values(updated_at)
